---
title: "Angela Zhu"
name: "Angela Zhu"
image: "/images/profile_pics/angela_zhu.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Interactive effects of precipitation and land-use on physiological stress in black-crowned antshrikes (Thamnophilus atrinucha)"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2022"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "8"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
